name: Dave Weckl
abstract: Dave Weckl (born January 8, 1960, in St. Louis, Missouri) is an American jazz fusion drummer and the leader of the Dave Weckl Band.

concerts.label: Tania Maria, Singer, with Michel Camilo, Piano

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: I hired him that night... That’s how the Elecktric Band got started... John Patitucci and Dave Weckl—within the group formed a trio
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
